message:
Improve search result formatting to prevent Claude Read tool 256KB limit failures

- Add file metadata: size in KB and total line count to search results
- Change format from verbose 3-line output to clean 1-line format:
  "Lines 10-25 in /path/file.jsonl (295.7KB, 1247 lines)"
- Make formatResults() and formatMultiConceptResults() async to support file metadata
- Update callers in mcp-server.ts and search-cli.ts for async functions
- Remove prescriptive MCP tool instructions - trust Claude to choose correct tool based on file size
- Add streaming line counting and file size utilities

Fixes issue where episodic memory search returned paths that triggered Claude's
built-in Read tool instead of the specialized MCP read tool for large files.
